sprint: Real Vector Shapes + Freeform Text -- Personalize
task: Two direct requests closed together: 'shapes like we have in world -- outline shapes, geometry shapes, free style shapes' and 'text too -- all text related options, nice kid friendly font, something which resembles handwriting fonts.' Both reuse the existing sticker instance array (slide.metadata.stickers[]) via a new kind discriminator ('shape'/'text', absent/'glyph' unchanged) rather than a new object model, so js/app.js, js/sceneEngine.js, js/objectStrip.js, js/pageRuntime.js, and js/projectManager.js needed zero changes -- hit-testing, drag, resize, duplicate, lock, delete, reorder, and save/reload all already work for any type:'sticker' object. Shapes: js/stickerLibrary.js's new SHAPE_KINDS (15 geometry kinds + Draw Your Own, mirroring World Builder's own catalog) feeds a new Context Panel picker; rendering reuses renderer/slideRenderer.js's existing _layerDrawShape (built for World-owned Layer Pack decorations) verbatim via new _drawSceneShape/_shapeBbox wrappers -- zero geometry reimplementation. js/cardDesigner.js's Refine panel gained a Shape controls group (Fill/Outline Colour+Opacity, Outline Thickness, and an inline Draw pad for freehand shapes, adapted from World Builder's own _shapeDrawPad). Text: a genuinely new freeform, draggable, auto-sizing Text object (height always derived live from real wrapped-line count, matching the AV-006/AV-010 auto-size-to-content precedent) via new _drawSceneText/_textObjBbox, with a new _ensureCanvasFont closing a real gap -- canvas font draws were synchronous with zero font-loading awareness anywhere in the renderer. Two new fonts (Kalam/handwriting, Nunito/kid-friendly) were added by copying the sibling vihuplanet product's own already-licensed self-hosted webfonts into a new assets/fonts/ folder -- zero new licensing risk, the app's first real font infrastructure. js/cardDesigner.js's Refine panel gained a Text controls group (Words textarea wrapped with the existing EmojiPicker, Font Family/Size/Weight/Style/Colour/Alignment/Width). Context Panel's Add Something menu gained real, separate Shapes and Text rows (Text promoting the previously-disclosed-as-unbuilt 'Note' stub into a real capability, since the underlying gap it named is now closed for real). Three real bugs found and fixed during Playwright verification: SceneEngine.addSticker's pre-existing truthy-stickerId guard needed a synthetic placeholder id for the two new kinds; EmojiPicker.wrap(el) moves el into a new wrapper and returns it -- the caller must insert the return value, not append el separately; several new .hidden-toggled CSS classes had zero real effect since this codebase has no shared global .hidden utility, needing their own explicit display:none rules. Verified via a new Playwright test (shape creation/recolor/draw-pad, text creation/typography/font-load verification via document.fonts.check, Object Strip thumbnails, serialize/deserialize round-trip) plus full regression across the entire existing Creator/Builder/Card-Platform suite and both goldenBuild.js suites, zero console errors. No Theme Contract/Engine V2 Scene Model/Builder change.
